name: Otokar Otomotiv ve Savunma Sanayi A.S.
summary: Otokar Otomotiv ve Savunma Sanayi A.S. engages in the manufacturing of commercial vehicles in Turkey. It manufactures and sells off road vehicles, armored vehicles, minibuses, autobuses, trailers, semi-trailers, light truck, and cross-country vehicles. The company also exports its products. It serves the automotive, transportation, logistics, and defense industries. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
